---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Deep Chat
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Mockups

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or screenshots to illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here. For example:
- Is this feature available in other chat applications you use?
- Would this be a frontend, backend, or both change?
- Are you willing to contribute this feature yourself?
